scripts.build: bun build src/bin/mason4agents.ts --outdir dist/bin --target bun && bun build src/pi/extension.ts --outdir dist/pi --target bun && cargo build --release && mkdir -p native && exe=$(node -e 'console.log(process.platform === "win32" ? ".exe" : "")') && src=$(echo target/release/mason4agents$exe) && dst=$(echo native/mason4agents-$(node -e 'console.log(process.platform + "-" + process.arch)')$exe) && cp "$src" "$dst"
